SEARCH

Uses of Package
net.sourceforge.plantuml.annotation

Packages that use net.sourceforge.plantuml.annotation
Package
Description
net.sourceforge.plantuml
Contains classes for processing PlantUML source files.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram.command
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram3.ftile
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram3.ftile.vcompact
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.board
Provides classes used to manage Board Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.bpm
Provides classes used to manage BPMN (Business Process Model and Notation) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.braille
Provides classes used to manage Braille output format.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.code
Provides classes used to manage Coding and Compression.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.crash
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML or Graphviz Crash.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.cucadiagram
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Class-UseCase-Activity (CUCA) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.dedication
Provides classes used to manage Dedication.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.definition
Provides classes used to manage Definition Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.descdiagram
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Description Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.dot
Provides classes used to manage Graphviz dot for layout engine.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.ebnf
Provides classes used to manage EBNF (Extended Backus–Naur Form) Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.eggs
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Easter Eggs.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.elk
Provides classes used to manage Eclipse Layout Kernel (ELK) for layout engine.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.flowdiagram
Provides classes used to manage Flow Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.golem
Provides classes used to manage Tile of especially Flow Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.jsondiagram
Provides classes used to manage JSON Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.creole
Provides classes used to manage Creole (markup language).
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.creole.legacy
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.shape
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.nwdiag.next
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.openiconic
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Openiconic icon set.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.project.lang
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.sdot
Provides classes used to manage Smetana (internal port of GraphViz in plantuml) for layout engine.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.sequencediagram.teoz
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.skin
Provides classes used to manage Skin and Skinparameter.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.sudoku
Provides classes used to manage Sudoku Grid on PlantUML.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.svek
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Svek Architecture.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.svek.image
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.teavm
Provides classes used to manage JS-PlantUML using TeaVM.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.wire
Provides classes used to manage Wire or Block Diagram.
  • Classes in net.sourceforge.plantuml.annotation used by net.sourceforge.plantuml
    Class
    Description
    DuplicateCode
    Indicates that the annotated class, method, constructor, or field is a duplication of another part of the code.
  • Classes in net.sourceforge.plantuml.annotation used by net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram.command
    Class
    Description
    DeadCode
     
  • Classes in net.sourceforge.plantuml.annotation used by net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram3.ftile
    Class
    Description
    Fast
    Marks a calculateDimension() implementation as known to be fast, meaning it does not need memoization via TextBlockMemoized.
  • Classes in net.sourceforge.plantuml.annotation used by net.sourceforge.plantuml.activitydiagram3.ftile.vcompact
    Class
    Description
    Fast
    Marks a calculateDimension() implementation as known to be fast, meaning it does not need memoization via TextBlockMemoized.
